blended.narrative: Teton Pass Ski Area is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 3.0 inches of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 3,527 ft. Looking ahead, 19 inches possible over the next 14 days.

Friday: 6" of snow, highs of 32°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Saturday: 8" of heavy snow, highs of 28°F. Expect powder.
